title: potato golem :3
body:
**Coming this summer in a theater near you. The greatest hit this year POTATTTOOO staring Potato!**

# potato golem :3

This mod adds "*a potato golem type thing*":

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aAaM95Nh/images/4ee6185543165b2430dfba744bc5e7fb2a52a7ad.png)

Spawnable with a "*Potato Spawn Mixture*":

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aAaM95Nh/images/0c8a215b1b88b56f7ffb6bab290577128f522744.png)

Which is tamable! (with any type of dirt) !!!

**Currently for forge and fabric 1.20.1**
